title: Ghoti Agent Arena local trace (N+6.23A)
description: Shape of the GET /api/trace payload served by the agent arena. Unlike the sample simulation, this trace is built from existing local Ghoti report files (committed Claude/Codex reports and the agent handoff vault) by a read-only, file-only loader. The loader runs no command, launches no agent, performs no install, writes nothing, opens no network connection, and surfaces no secret value or absolute local path. live_execution and simulation are always false.
x_source: local report files under 14_context (claude_n6_*.md, codex_n6_*.md) and the agent handoff vault; paths are repo-relative

status.description: Status cards derived read-only from the most recent local reports.

latest_main_commit_recorded.description: Short commit recorded in the newest local report (file-only; not a live git read).

memory_vault_present.description: True if 14_context/memory_vault/README.md exists (presence check only; never modified).

tool_intake_present.description: True if the tool intake inventory JSON exists (presence check only; never modified).

agents.description: Derived roster: Claude builder, Codex auditor, Hermes coordinator, human approver.

timeline.description: One state-transition event per parsed report (milestone -> verdict).

handoffs.description: Repo-relative handoff files from the agent handoff vault.

traces.description: Ordered replay steps, newest report first.

reports.description: Parsed report rows: milestone, title, verdict, branch, codex_audit_target, agent, repo-relative path.

safety.description: The read-only, file-only safe posture echoed in the payload.
